title: perf: polly bot + API performance optimizations
author: Itachi-1824

gist.headline: Polly reads the matrix
gist.blurb: Our favorite bee can now speak fluent GraphQL. She's reading the raw data streams directly for faster, smarter answers.
gist.summary: Enhanced the Polly bot's GitHub integration to allow direct, read-only GraphQL queries and unrestricted GET requests for deeper repository insights.
gist.impact: Polly can now answer more complex questions about the codebase and issues with greater speed and accuracy.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee as a hacker/analyst. She has gained the ability to read raw data (GraphQL). Depict her interfacing with a stream of digital code.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny headset, analyzing a flowing stream of lime green (#ecf874) code blocks like the Matrix. A retro monitor robot nearby displays a complex graph. Soft dark purple background with glowing data streams. Pixel font text: 'ACCESS GRANTED'. Warm lighting, lo-fi sci-fi vibes. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients.
